overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval castle fortress at night. The character traverses stone battlements, enters through a fortified gate, and continues along a coastal cliffside path illuminated by torchlight against a dark teal sky.

events.description: passes a stationary guard holding a torch along the castle wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the castle wall pathway with sword on back and torch in hand

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing still holding a lit torch

entered.detail: tall fortified stone wall with crenellated battlements running along the left side
tall cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows and conical roof
crenellated stone parapets along the top of the wall
wall-mounted iron torches providing warm orange light against the cool night
narrow dirt trail running between the wall and cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path between a tall stone castle wall on the left and a steep drop-off on the right. The scene is lit by wall-mounted torches and the dark teal night sky. A guard stands motionless by the wall as the character approaches a stone staircase in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified gate entrance with stone stairs

events.description: character enters through the large wooden gate into the stone archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the fortified gate while holding a torch

notable_agents.action: guard standing at the top of the stairs near the gate entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the gate entrance
large reinforced wooden doors with iron bands and a small viewing grate
thick stone tunnel with vaulted ceiling and wooden portcullis above

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by walls, approaching a large fortified wooden gate. After passing through the gate, the scene transitions into a short stone tunnel archway. The lighting shifts to the warm glow of a torch brazier as the character moves through the threshold.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path overlooking the ocean

events.description: exiting the gate reveals an expansive view of the ocean and coastal cliffs
character passes through a group of torch-bearing pedestrians walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal path while passing a procession of torch-bearing villagers or priests

notable_agents.action: group of three robed figures carrying torches walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: dark calm sea visible beyond the cliff edge, merging with the night sky
rocky cliff face dropping down to the water below
tall white stone tower with red roof and flagpoles visible in the distance
abandoned wooden wagon with large wheels sitting near the cliff edge
cluster of small stone buildings with red tiled roofs along the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens to a breathtaking coastal view with the ocean stretching into the dark horizon. Geralt walks along a cobblestone path lined with torch braziers, passing stone houses on the left and a steep cliff on the right. The character moves through a group of robed torch-bearers walking in procession toward a distant white tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with half-timbered houses and large trees

events.description: path curves left passing a large oak tree and medieval half-timbered house

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding village path past stone walls and timber-framed buildings

entered.detail: massive spreading oak tree with thick branches extending over the path
traditional medieval house with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
low stone wall running alongside the path with red roof tiles visible behind

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a village area with stone walls and traditional half-timbered houses. A large oak tree dominates the center of the view as the character walks past, with warm torchlight illuminating the cobblestones. The ocean view recedes as the path curves inland through the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fortified castle perimeter that gradually opens into a torchlit coastal settlement. It begins with Geralt walking a narrow dirt path between a towering stone wall and a steep drop-off under a dark teal night sky. As the character ascends a wide stone staircase, the scene transitions through a fortified wooden gate and a short tunnel archway, where the lighting shifts to the warm glow of torch braziers. The view then expands upon emerging from the gate to reveal a breathtaking ocean horizon and a cobblestone path lined with robed torch-bearers moving toward a distant white tower. Finally, the path curves inland through a village of half-timbered houses and a dominant oak tree, causing the coastal vista to recede as the character moves deeper into the settlement.
